claim: The main exponential form used in the manuscript is Lorentz-covariant.
The manuscript uses a full Bose-Einstein distribution, not only a Boltzmann/Juttner approximation.
High-multiplicity bins are poorly constrained by a 3-component fit.
A true Bose-Einstein fit yields significantly different freeze-out temperatures than the Juttner approximation at low pT.
Tsallis distribution provides a thermodynamically consistent baseline for non-extensive transverse momentum spectra.
